{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321231700FDF38556509BDA20C839"}"},"total":557},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7298349782824076083","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不说其他的，我觉得少年派这个写的真的很不错，单女主可没有加上林妙妙了，作者写的也很搞笑，就很符合少年派的氛围。这个世界里主角的人设是又菜又爱玩王者荣耀，然后也不像之前别人老早就知道他是天才少年，然后对他一番敬佩的这种，因为主角是转学的，他们都不知道主角成绩，都以为他很差，然后第一次考试惊艳全班。","text_exts":[{"e":12,"s":9,"text":"少年派","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B0%91%E5%B9%B4%E6%B4%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774106220DA20C839%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227298349782824076083%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227196858807845129227%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B0%91%E5%B9%B4%E6%B4%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":75,"s":71,"text":"王者荣耀","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%8E%8B%E8%80%85%E8%8D%A3%E8%80%80&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774106220DA20C839%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227298349782824076083%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227196858807845129227%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%8E%8B%E8%80%85%E8%8D%A3%E8%80%80%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699280194,"group_id":"7196858807845129227","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/5AUMEheOQ1RIvi5vBwXYE=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user 楚乔传世界，李言抢楚乔，坑宇文玥、燕洵，给元淳一个好结局。
家有儿女世界，他是小雪的男神。
